changes.before: "You outrank nothing in that chamber. That is why they built it." / "Competent. Close relation."
changes.after: "You outrank nothing in that chamber," Lor'themar said, sunlight catching the links at his throat as he glanced over. "That is why they built it." / "Competent," he said. "Close relation."
changes.rationale: Zone flagged as telegram_run; joined adjacent banter beats to keep the exchange clipped without the page falling into one-line monotony.

changes.before: "Message from Cyndia's post. Human mage crossed the first ward ring before dawn. Reached the second. Caught at the stones."
changes.after: "Message from Cyndia's post. Human mage crossed the first ward ring before dawn, reached the second, and got caught at the stones."
changes.rationale: Zone flagged as texture_desert; folded the runner's clipped report into fewer sentence units so urgency stayed while connective tissue increased.

changes.before: "Cyndia and the watch felt a drag in the hum at the outer stones. She took two rangers and found the prisoner..."
changes.after: "Cyndia and the watch felt a drag in the hum at the outer stones, and she took two rangers to the second marker, finding the prisoner..."
changes.rationale: Zone flagged as texture_desert; carried motion and briefing in the same breath so the ride south reads as one sustained pressure line.

changes.before: "Chalk still dusted the base. Frost glazed one side thin and bright."
changes.after: "Chalk still dusted the base, frost glazing one side thin and bright; heel marks scored the dirt nearby..."
changes.rationale: Zone flagged as texture_desert; bound evidence, reaction, and inference into the same syntactic unit so the ward inspection stopped stuttering.

changes.before: "A guard brought it over, weathered leather tied with ordinary cord. Sylvanas opened it herself."
changes.after: "A guard brought it over, weathered leather tied with ordinary cord, and Sylvanas opened it herself, peeling back the flap with her thumb."
changes.rationale: Zone flagged as texture_desert; connected object handling to Sylvanas's judgment so the satchel sequence kept moving instead of breaking into hard stops.

changes.before: "At the door the guards straightened. Blue light climbed Sylvanas's boots and sharpened the iron bands; inside, one person was breathing too tightly to pass for calm."
changes.after: "At the door the guards straightened, blue light climbing Sylvanas's boots and sharpening the iron bands while inside one person breathed too tightly to pass for calm."
changes.rationale: Zone flagged as telegram_run; turned the holding-room reveal into a single controlled sweep before the interrogation line lands.

selfAuditNotes: Re-read all changed zones against Sylvanas and Jaina voice sheets; no edit shifted dialogue into modern or explanatory register.
Adjusted one threshold sentence in P189-P200 during self-audit to remove an awkward pause after 'while' without changing the zone's meaning.
All added participial phrases describe physically plausible simultaneous action.
No new eye/gaze-beat repetition introduced in changed zones.

Residual deficit remains in participial density: rhythm scorer moved participial_pct from 1.1 to 3.8, compound_pct from 6.6 to 11.7, emdash_pct from 1.1 to 2.8, semicolon_pct from 1.4 to 1.9, short_pct from 66.2 to 59.3, and texture_score from 10.2 to 20.2.
